title: allowlist.json — accepted cross-framework deviations (suppressed in the fidelity grade)
description: Token + render deltas that are intentional, not drift. The grader pairs by RENDERED hex/geometry, never token name. Seed from the project's design-tokens vs Claude Design tokens diff + the known Skia-vs-CSS engine deltas.

class.description: token = palette/scale deviation; render = engine (Skia line-box, elevation/shadow, AA edges, M3 padding).

rule.description: Human description of the accepted deviation.

suppress.description: The precise condition under which a vision finding is suppressed.
